name: Goblin (project default)
source: Custom palette for the project's goblin sprite — hue-shifted ramps authored for this repo (see rules/01-palette-and-color.md).
notes: Goblin skin ramp is hue-shifted: dark step is teal-green (#1B4D3E), highlight climbs toward yellow-green (#A6D94A) — not a flat darken/lighten. Club/leather uses the brown ramp; the weapon must stay a big readable shape (rules/03). Outline is cool near-black (#1B1226), not pure black. Reserve #FFEC27 eye-glint and #D8202E accent for sparse focal hits only.
